metadata.description: A female-presenting individual in their 20s-30s has olive skin with visible freckles across the nose and cheeks. Her face is oval with a softly defined jawline. Her dark brown hair is pulled back into a low bun, revealing a clean hairline. Her almond-shaped eyes are a striking hazel, set wide apart. Her medium-thick eyebrows are naturally arched. She has a straight nose with a slightly rounded tip. Her lips are medium-full with a gentle upward curve. She has a warm, subtle smile and her head is angled slightly to the left, looking directly at the viewer.
metadata.anchor: Woman with striking hazel eyes and freckles
